description: A pixel-art RPG village where residents are figuring out new life purpose after the hero saved the world and left. A grand stone statue of the hero stands in the central plaza, with every corner holding traces of the past adventure era.

multiDay.endOfDayText: The sun dips below the hills, villagers lock up their homes and return indoors for the night.
multiDay.newDayText: The rooster crows at dawn, the village wakes up to another quiet peaceful day.
